---
title: "Katharine Lee Jenner"
---

## Katharine Lee Jenner

**Dates:** (1853-1936)

**Maiden name:** (Rawlings)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1879)

### Biography

She married (1877) Henry Jenner.  According to <i>Henry and Katharine Jenner</i> ed. Derek R. Williams  (London: Francis Boutle 2004) 265, she contributed ‘The Wooing of Gudrun in the Elf-World: A Saga of Nordland’ to <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1879).

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
